name: qa_manager_agentic_bridge_queue_workflow_step
desc: Queue a single QA Manager command (run_error_check / clash detection / capture / export / import etc.) into the Supabase agentic_qa_queue table for a remote Revit session running the polling bridge to execute. Requires env vars MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_SUPABASE_URL, MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_SUPABASE_KEY, MEPBRIDGE_AGENTIC_BRIDGE_SECRET. Returns the correlation_id immediately; when wait_seconds > 0 the tool polls agentic_qa_results until the remote session posts the outcome.

parameters.name: command_id
parameters.description: Revit command class name to queue. Must be on the bridge allowlist (QA / clash / error / export classes).

parameters.name: parameters_json
parameters.description: Optional JSON object of parameters the command expects (e.g. {\

parameters.name: correlation_id
parameters.description: Optional caller-supplied correlation id. When omitted a new GUID is generated.

parameters.name: wait_seconds
parameters.description: Poll the results table for up to N seconds and return the outcome when ready. 0 = fire-and-forget (default 60).
